MORIMENS_DOLL_CHARACTER_DOLL.aromaPrinci: [sine][blue]A clean template is ready for a new run.[/blue][/sine]

A sample character used to verify the RitsuLib template project.
Replace this text with your own character concept after copying the template.

MORIMENS_DOLL_CHARACTER_DOLL.goldMonolog: This gold is enough to start testing.

MORIMENS_DOLL_CHARACTER_DOLL.unlockText: Complete a run as [pink]{Prerequisite}[/pink] to unlock this character.
